  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant Supervisor",
  "description": "At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don&rsquo;t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we&rsquo;ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we&rsquo;re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Supervisor

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Supervise, train, and mentor front-of-house and back-of-house staff to ensure optimal performance.
	Conduct regular staff meetings to address concerns and provide updates on restaurant policies and procedures.
	Ensure all guests receive prompt, professional, and courteous service.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues promptly and effectively.
	Monitor the dining area to ensure a pleasant and safe environment for all guests.
	Oversee daily restaurant operations, including opening and closing procedures.
	Ensure all food and beverages are prepared and presented to the highest quality standards.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and safe restaurant environment, adhering to health and safety regulations.
	Assist in managing the restaurant&rsquo;s budget, monitoring daily sales, and preparing daily and monthly reports.
	Control costs by minimizing waste and optimizing inventory usage.
	Provide ongoing training and development opportunities for team members.
	Evaluate staff performance and provide constructive feedback to promote growth.
	Enforce company policies, including attendance, dress code, and workplace conduct.
	Monitor inventory levels and report shortages or maintenance issues to management.
	Ensure strict adherence to food safety, hygiene, and health regulations.


Qualifications


	Minimum OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality, Business, or a related field preferred.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience in restaurant supervision or front-of-house management.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and resolve conflicts under pressure.
	Customer-focused mindset with attention to detail.
	Knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and operational standards.
	Proficiency in POS systems and basic administrative tasks.


Compensation, Scope of Work, and Benefits


	Salary: ?150,000 per month
	Days of Work: Monday &ndash; Saturday
	Working Hours: 7:00 AM &ndash; 7:00 PM
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;firewoodjollofcareers@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of email.",

Restaurant Supervisor Job at Firewood Rice Nigeria




        
    

        
        At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don’t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we’ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we’re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise, train, and mentor front-of-house and back-of-house staff to ensure optimal performance.
	Conduct regular staff meetings to address concerns and provide updates on restaurant policies and procedures.
	Ensure all guests receive prompt, professional, and courteous service.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues promptly and effectively.
	Monitor the dining area to ensure a pleasant and safe environment for all guests.
	Oversee daily restaurant operations, including opening and closing procedures.
	Ensure all food and beverages are prepared and presented to the highest quality standards.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and safe restaurant environment, adhering to health and safety regulations.
	Assist in managing the restaurant’s budget, monitoring daily sales, and preparing daily and monthly reports.
	Control costs by minimizing waste and optimizing inventory usage.
	Provide ongoing training and development opportunities for team members.
	Evaluate staff performance and provide constructive feedback to promote growth.
	Enforce company policies, including attendance, dress code, and workplace conduct.
	Monitor inventory levels and report shortages or maintenance issues to management.
	Ensure strict adherence to food safety, hygiene, and health regulations.


Qualifications


	Minimum OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality, Business, or a related field preferred.
	2–3 years of experience in restaurant supervision or front-of-house management.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and resolve conflicts under pressure.
	Customer-focused mindset with attention to detail.
	Knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and operational standards.
	Proficiency in POS systems and basic administrative tasks.


Compensation, Scope of Work, and Benefits


	Salary: ?150,000 per month
	Days of Work: Monday – Saturday
	Working Hours: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of email.

title: Savings and Mobilization Officer Job at Just Recruitment Agency
content:
Just Recruitment Agency specialized services encompass a wide range of industries, including but not limited to IT, finance, sales, marketing, HR, and more. Whether your company operates in a niche market or a large-scale industry, our freelance recruitment agency have the expertise to source top talent that aligns with your specific requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Savings and Mobilization Officer

Job Location: Satellite Town, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Savings & Deposit Mobilisation:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Recruit and onboard new savers, contributors, and investors into approved savings and investment products.
	Mobilise daily, weekly, and monthly contributions from individuals, traders, cooperatives, and SMEs.
	Educate customers on available financial products and their benefits.


Customer Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to encourage repeat savings and referrals.
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally.
	Ensure customer retention through regular follow-ups and engagement.


Field & Community Engagement:


	Conduct market visits, community outreach, and group sensitisation programs.
	Identify new savings clusters, associations, and cooperatives.
	Represent the organization at community meetings and empowerment programs


Collection & Documentation:


	Ensure all collections are properly receipted and recorded in line with company policy.
	Submit daily collection reports and documentation promptly.
	Ensure all funds are remitted to the company account without delay.


Reporting & Performance Tracking:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly mobilisation reports.
	Meet assigned savings mobilisation targets.
	Provide market feedback and product improvement suggestions.


Job Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Minimum of OND, HND, or BSc in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Marketing, or related fields.
	Relevant experience may be considered in place of formal education.


Experience:


	1–3 years of experience in savings mobilisation, sales, marketing, microfinance, or cooperative services.
	Experience in grassroots or market-based financial services is an advantage.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong communication and persuasion skills.
	Basic knowledge of savings, investment, and financial products.
	Ability to work independently and meet targets.
	High level of integrity and trustworthiness.
	Good record-keeping and basic digital literacy.


Personal Attributes:


	Self-motivated and result-oriented.
	Presentable and professional.
	Familiar with local markets and communities.
	Willingness to work in the field.


Salary
N120,000 – N150,000 monthly + Commission based on Financial Targets.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, WhatsApp 08073393652.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant / Administrative Officer",
  "description": "Citimobile Media Limited is a Nigerian-based out-of-home (OOH) advertising and 360 marketing communications company. They&#39;re headquartered in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. They specialize in bespoke OOH advertising services with innovative solutions like LED screens, gantry eye catchers, and bus branding. Their products include LED screens, billboards, light boxes, and lamp posts at strategic locations in Lagos and Ibadan. They focus on bridging the gap between brands and consumers, with a belief that their outdoor advertising platforms promise high ROI and optimum brand awareness. The company emphasizes staying updated on the latest outdoor advertising practices and tailoring its approach to meet each client&#39;s unique needs. They&#39;ve also built capabilities in digital marketing, positioning themselves as a comprehensive marketing communications agency rather than just traditional OOH.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant /&nbsp; Administrative Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will manage and oversee the company&rsquo;s financial operations, including bookkeeping, accounts payable and receivable, payroll support, and financial reporting.
	The role requires maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, and supporting efficient day-to-day accounting operations that contribute to business growth


Roles &amp; Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate records of all financial transactions, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger entries
	Prepare timely financial reports, statements, and summaries for management review
	Assist in budget preparation and monitor expenditure against approved budgets
	Ensure timely disbursement of funds for company operations, including operational expenses
	Process employee reimbursement requests accurately and promptly
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, internal policies, and tax requirements
	Monitor and manage cash flow to meet operational and financial obligations
	Manage invoicing and billing processes efficiently
	Follow up on outstanding payments and support debt recovery efforts
	Liaise with vendors and internal teams to ensure effective financial operations
	Maintain organized financial records and supporting documents for audits and reviews
	Suggest and implement improvements to accounting processes for better efficiency
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Education &amp; Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3+ years of relevant experience in accounting and administrative functions
	ACCA, ICAN, or CPA certification is an added advantage
	Experience in VAT filing and compliance
	Familiarity with Etax Pro Max software
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations


Skills &amp; Competence:


	Accounting and financial reporting
	Budgeting and cash flow management
	Invoicing, billing, and debt recovery management
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Analytical and problem-solving skills
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Good communication and organisational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@citimobilemedia.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Accountant /  Administrative Officer Job at Citimobile Media Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Citimobile Media Limited is a Nigerian-based out-of-home (OOH) advertising and 360 marketing communications company. They're headquartered in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. They specialize in bespoke OOH advertising services with innovative solutions like LED screens, gantry eye catchers, and bus branding. Their products include LED screens, billboards, light boxes, and lamp posts at strategic locations in Lagos and Ibadan. They focus on bridging the gap between brands and consumers, with a belief that their outdoor advertising platforms promise high ROI and optimum brand awareness. The company emphasizes staying updated on the latest outdoor advertising practices and tailoring its approach to meet each client's unique needs. They've also built capabilities in digital marketing, positioning themselves as a comprehensive marketing communications agency rather than just traditional OOH.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant /  Administrative Officer
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will manage and oversee the company’s financial operations, including bookkeeping, accounts payable and receivable, payroll support, and financial reporting.
	The role requires maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, and supporting efficient day-to-day accounting operations that contribute to business growth


Roles & Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate records of all financial transactions, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger entries
	Prepare timely financial reports, statements, and summaries for management review
	Assist in budget preparation and monitor expenditure against approved budgets
	Ensure timely disbursement of funds for company operations, including operational expenses
	Process employee reimbursement requests accurately and promptly
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, internal policies, and tax requirements
	Monitor and manage cash flow to meet operational and financial obligations
	Manage invoicing and billing processes efficiently
	Follow up on outstanding payments and support debt recovery efforts
	Liaise with vendors and internal teams to ensure effective financial operations
	Maintain organized financial records and supporting documents for audits and reviews
	Suggest and implement improvements to accounting processes for better efficiency
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Education & Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3+ years of relevant experience in accounting and administrative functions
	ACCA, ICAN, or CPA certification is an added advantage
	Experience in VAT filing and compliance
	Familiarity with Etax Pro Max software
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations


Skills & Competence:


	Accounting and financial reporting
	Budgeting and cash flow management
	Invoicing, billing, and debt recovery management
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Analytical and problem-solving skills
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Good communication and organisational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Manager",
  "description": "Upperbound Contractors Limited is a leading construction company in Nigeria, providing comprehensive management, maintenance, and sustainable power solutions&nbsp; for residential, commercial, and corporate properties.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan,&nbsp;Oyo
Employment Type:

Job Summary


	We are seeking a young, vibrant, and knowledgeable Comprehensive Facility Manager with strong experience in residential property management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the efficient operation, maintenance, and overall management of residential facilities, delivering high-quality services to residents while maintaining optimal asset value.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of residential facilities and estates
	Ensure all building systems (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) are functioning efficiently
	Manage preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Supervise and coordinate service providers, contractors, and vendors
	Handle resident complaints and ensure prompt resolution of issues
	Monitor facility budgets, track expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations
	Conduct routine inspections to ensure compliance with safety and quality standards
	Implement health, safety, and environmental policies within the facility
	Prepare regular reports on facility performance and maintenance activities
	Support occupancy management, move-ins, and move-outs where required


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or related field
	1&ndash;5 years experience in facility management, preferably in residential estates
	Strong technical knowledge of building systems and maintenance practices
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools


Key Competencies:


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	High level of energy and adaptability
	Strong customer service orientation
	Attention to detail and accountability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines


Preferred Attributes:


	Experience managing residential estates
	Familiarity with vendor and contract management
	Basic financial and budgeting knowledge


Application Closing Date
30th April, 2026.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@upperbond.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Oyo",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

Facility Manager Job at Upperbound Contractors Limited




        
    

        
        Upperbound Contractors Limited is a leading construction company in Nigeria, providing comprehensive management, maintenance, and sustainable power solutions  for residential, commercial, and corporate properties.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type:

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a young, vibrant, and knowledgeable Comprehensive Facility Manager with strong experience in residential property management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the efficient operation, maintenance, and overall management of residential facilities, delivering high-quality services to residents while maintaining optimal asset value.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of residential facilities and estates
	Ensure all building systems (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) are functioning efficiently
	Manage preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Supervise and coordinate service providers, contractors, and vendors
	Handle resident complaints and ensure prompt resolution of issues
	Monitor facility budgets, track expenses, and ensure cost-effective operations
	Conduct routine inspections to ensure compliance with safety and quality standards
	Implement health, safety, and environmental policies within the facility
	Prepare regular reports on facility performance and maintenance activities
	Support occupancy management, move-ins, and move-outs where required


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Facility Management, Estate Management, or related field
	1–5 years experience in facility management, preferably in residential estates
	Strong technical knowledge of building systems and maintenance practices
	Excellent problem-solving and organizational skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools


Key Competencies:


	Proactive and solution-oriented mindset
	High level of energy and adaptability
	Strong customer service orientation
	Attention to detail and accountability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines


Preferred Attributes:


	Experience managing residential estates
	Familiarity with vendor and contract management
	Basic financial and budgeting knowledge


Application Closing Date
30th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Quality Assurance Officer",
  "description": "Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Performing routine inspections and quality tests.
	Identifying and resolving workflow and production issues.
	Ensuring that standards and safety regulations are observed.
	Addressing and discussing issues and proposed solutions with superiors.
	Documenting quality assurance activities and creating audit reports.
	Making recommendations for improvement.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;gymspadorisfit@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Quality Assurance Officer Job at Dorisfit




        
    

        
        Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance Officer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Performing routine inspections and quality tests.
	Identifying and resolving workflow and production issues.
	Ensuring that standards and safety regulations are observed.
	Addressing and discussing issues and proposed solutions with superiors.
	Documenting quality assurance activities and creating audit reports.
	Making recommendations for improvement.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
